title: encyclia altissima
intro: Encyclia altissima, also known as the giant orchid, is a rare and endangered species of flowering plant native to Central America. The plant's medicinal properties include its use in treating various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Encyclia altissima include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
